items.scenario: You recently bought a wireless printer from an online store. After two weeks the paper tray cracked and pages jam constantly. The listing promised a one-year warranty, but the seller has not answered either of your two messages.
items.direction: Write an email to the store representative. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problems with the printer
Request a repair or a replacement
items.subject: Warranty repair for a cracked printer tray

items.scenario: You are a tenant in a downtown apartment where the hot water has been off for three days. You have called the front desk twice, but the boiler still has not been fixed and cold showers are becoming unbearable.
items.direction: Write an email to the building manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how long the hot water has been off
Describe the effect on your daily routine
Ask when the repair will be finished
items.subject: Hot water outage in my apartment for three days

items.scenario: You recently finished a summer internship at a marketing firm and enjoyed working with your team. You would like to stay in touch and ask about part-time openings for the coming semester, since your supervisor mentioned the company often hires former interns.
items.direction: Write an email to your former supervisor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Thank your supervisor for the internship
Ask about part-time openings for the semester
Offer to send an updated resume
items.subject: Following up after my summer internship

items.scenario: You joined a weekend reading program at your local community center where volunteers help children practice. The sessions are popular, but the room is too small and often runs out of books, so many children end up waiting without an activity.
items.direction: Write an email to the program coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe your experience with the program
Explain the problems with space and books
Offer ideas for improving future sessions
items.subject: Feedback on the weekend reading program
